name: Google Calendar
description: Google Calendar is commonly used to support leadership / people workflows, reviews, and handoffs.
whyUseIt: Use Google Calendar when the team needs more structure, visibility, or speed in leadership / people work.
founderWorkflow: Use Google Calendar to keep leadership / people work visible enough for fast reviews and cleaner delegation.
beginnerMistakes: Adding Google Calendar before the process around it is defined.
Using the tool as a reporting surface instead of a decision surface.
